signal_evidence.services_demand: April net deposits are around $6.5 billion. Equities trading is at a four-year high. Options are in the zone of an all-time high, and crypto trading is north of $8 billion.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We've recently launched three new products — futures, index options and prediction markets — and there are several more businesses that we recently announced and expect to begin contributing later this year, including Robinhood Strategies, Robinhood Banking and our acquisition of Bitstamp.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We're continuing to experiment. We've been seeing the take rates come up sequentially for several quarters now... the big opportunity is bringing in volumes, trading volumes that are today not coming to Robinhood.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Unlike where the business was back in 2022... the new focus on being the best platform for active traders has made us more resilient in times like these... we have multiple mechanisms for these active traders to engage no matter what the market environment is.
